papers.title: PIF4 Integrates Multiple Environmental and Hormonal Signals for Plant Growth Regulation in Arabidopsis
A warm temperature-released negative feedback loop fine-tunes PIF4-mediated thermomorphogenesis in Arabidopsis
papers.authors: Li H, Xue M, Zhang H, Zhao F, Li X, Yu S, Jiang D

papers.title: XBAT31 regulates thermoresponsive hypocotyl growth through mediating degradation of the thermosensor ELF3 in Arabidopsis
papers.authors: Zhang LL, Shao YJ, Ding L, Wang MJ, Davis SJ, Liu JX

papers.title: BBX21, an Arabidopsis B-box protein, directly activates HY5 and is targeted by COP1 for 26S proteasome-mediated degradation
papers.authors: Xu D, Jiang Y, Li J, Lin F, Holm M, Deng XW

papers.title: The brassinosteroid signaling network - a paradigm of signal integration
papers.authors: Wang W, Bai MY, Wang ZY

papers.title: Gibberellin Metabolism, Perception and Signaling Pathways in Arabidopsis

edges.mechanism: Brassinosteroid binds to extracellular LRR-island domain of BRI1 receptor kinase
edges.evidence_sentence: BR directly binds to extracellular domain of BRI1 at pocket formed by island loop

edges.mechanism: BR-bound BRI1 dimerizes with BAK1 co-receptor and transphosphorylates it
edges.evidence_sentence: BR acts as molecular glue to bring together BRI1 and BAK1; sequential transphosphorylation activates kinases

edges.mechanism: BRI1 phosphorylates plasma membrane-anchored BSK1 kinase
edges.evidence_sentence: BRI1 phosphorylates members of plasma membrane-anchored cytoplasmic kinases, BRASSINOSTEROID-SIGNALLING KINASE1

edges.mechanism: BSK1/CDG1 phosphorylates BSU1 phosphatase activating it
edges.evidence_sentence: CDG1 phosphorylates BRI1-SUPPRESSOR1 phosphatase

edges.mechanism: BSU1 phosphatase dephosphorylates and inactivates GSK3 kinase BIN2
edges.evidence_sentence: BSU1 phosphatase dephosphorylates and inactivates GSK3-like kinase BIN2

edges.mechanism: BIN2 phosphorylates BZR1 to retain it in cytoplasm and inhibit DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: BIN2 phosphorylates BZR1 to inhibit nuclear localization and DNA-binding activity

edges.mechanism: BIN2 phosphorylates BES1/BZR2 to inhibit its activity
edges.evidence_sentence: BIN2 phosphorylates BZR2 to inhibit its activity

edges.mechanism: PP2A dephosphorylates BZR1, activating it for nuclear localization
edges.evidence_sentence: PROTEIN PHOSPHATASE 2A dephosphorylates BZR1 when BR levels are high

edges.mechanism: PP2A dephosphorylates BES1
edges.evidence_sentence: PP2A dephosphorylates BZR2/BES1 when BR levels are high

edges.mechanism: BZR1 transcriptionally activates cell elongation genes (PRE, SAUR), and represses BR biosynthesis genes (feedback)
edges.evidence_sentence: bes1-D dominant mutant shows BR-hypersensitive phenotype with increased elongation

edges.mechanism: BES1 acts redundantly with BZR1 to activate cell elongation genes
edges.evidence_sentence: BZR1 and BZR2/BES1 both activate and repress roughly equal numbers of target genes

edges.mechanism: BIN2 GSK3 kinase represses growth via phosphorylation of BZR1/BES1; bin2-1 gain-of-function gives dwarf hypocotyl, bin2 loss-of-function gives long
edges.evidence_sentence: BIN2 phosphorylates BZR1 and BES1 inhibiting their activity

edges.mechanism: Brassinosteroid signaling promotes hypocotyl elongation via BZR1/BES1; BR-deficient mutants are dwarfs
edges.evidence_sentence: BR signaling promotes hypocotyl elongation

edges.mechanism: DWF4 (CYP90B1) catalyzes 22α-hydroxylation, a rate-limiting step in BR biosynthesis
edges.evidence_sentence: DWF4 plays a role in brassinosteroid biosynthesis

edges.mechanism: CPD (CYP90A1) catalyzes 23α-hydroxylation in BR biosynthesis
edges.evidence_sentence: CPD is defective in the 23α-hydroxylation step

edges.mechanism: DET2 (steroid 5α-reductase) catalyzes early step in BR biosynthesis
edges.evidence_sentence: DET2 catalyzes early step in brassinosteroid biosynthesis pathway

edges.mechanism: BAS1 (CYP734A1) inactivates active BRs by C-26 hydroxylation
edges.evidence_sentence: BAS1/CYP734A1 catalyzes C-26 hydroxylation of brassinolide and is induced by exogenous BRs

edges.mechanism: BZR1 negatively feeds back to DWF4 transcription, maintaining BR homeostasis
edges.evidence_sentence: BZR1 represses BR biosynthetic gene DWF4 forming negative feedback

edges.mechanism: PIF4 directly binds DWF4 G-box to activate BR biosynthesis
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4/PIF5 associate with G-box motifs in promoters of DWF4

edges.mechanism: COG1 binds PIF4 promoter and activates expression to increase BR biosynthesis
edges.evidence_sentence: COG1 binds directly to the promoter regions of PIF4 and PIF5 to regulate their expression

edges.mechanism: COG1 binds PIF5 promoter and activates expression
edges.evidence_sentence: COG1 binds promoter regions of PIF4 and PIF5

edges.mechanism: BZR1 directly binds PIF4 forming heterodimer that cooperatively activates shared targets (cell elongation genes)
edges.evidence_sentence: BZR1 and PIFs directly interact and co-regulate shared target genes; cooperatively regulate large numbers of common target genes

edges.mechanism: BIN2 phosphorylates PIF4 and marks it for proteasomal degradation
edges.evidence_sentence: BIN2 phosphorylates PIF4 as well as BZR1, and this phosphorylation marks PIF4 for 26S proteasome-mediated degradation

edges.mechanism: ARF6 activates cell wall remodeling genes (XTHs, EXPs, PREs) cooperatively with PIF4 and BZR1 to promote elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: ARF6 target genes encode cell wall proteins involved in cell expansion

edges.mechanism: BZR1 physically interacts with ARF6 and enhances ARF6 binding to shared promoters
edges.evidence_sentence: BZR1 and PIF4 interact with ARF6 directly and enhance its binding to shared promoters

edges.mechanism: PIF4 interacts with ARF6 and enhances binding to shared promoters
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 interacts with ARF6 and enhances its binding to shared promoters

edges.mechanism: BZR1 activates PRE family of HLH growth-promoting factors
edges.evidence_sentence: BZR1, ARF6, and PIF4 directly activate members of PACLOBUTRAZOL RESISTANCE family of HLH factors

edges.mechanism: PRE1 sequesters IBH1, preventing IBH1 from inhibiting HBI1
edges.evidence_sentence: PRE1 binds to IBH1 to prevent its inhibition of HBI1 and ACEs

edges.mechanism: IBH1 binds HBI1 and inhibits its DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: IBH1 inhibits family of DNA-binding bHLH factors including HBI1

edges.mechanism: HBI1 activates cell elongation genes overlapping with PIF targets
edges.evidence_sentence: HBI1 target genes mostly also direct targets of PIFs; HBI1 activates many common target genes involved in cell elongation

edges.mechanism: DELLA proteins directly bind PIF4 N-terminus, blocking PIF4 DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: DELLA proteins interact with and inhibit DNA binding activities of PIFs

edges.mechanism: DELLA binds PIF3 to block DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: DELLA proteins directly interact with PIF3 and PIF4, inactivating their function

edges.mechanism: DELLA directly binds BZR1 to inhibit DNA binding
edges.evidence_sentence: DELLA proteins inhibit DNA binding activities of BZR1

edges.mechanism: DELLA binds ARF6 to inhibit its DNA binding activity
edges.evidence_sentence: DELLA proteins inhibit DNA binding activities of ARF6

edges.mechanism: DELLA represses elongation by sequestering PIF/BZR/ARF; DELLA degradation by GA derepresses growth
edges.evidence_sentence: GA-deficient mutants are extreme dwarfs with much reduced hypocotyl lengths

edges.mechanism: GA4 binds GID1 receptor to induce conformational change enabling DELLA recruitment
edges.evidence_sentence: GA-GID1 binding induces DELLA degradation

edges.mechanism: GA-GID1 binds DELLA and recruits SCF(SLY1) for ubiquitination and degradation
edges.evidence_sentence: GA-GID1 binding induces DELLA ubiquitination by SCFSLY1

edges.mechanism: SLY1 F-box recruits DELLA into SCF E3 ligase complex for proteasomal degradation
edges.evidence_sentence: F-box protein recruits DELLA for SCF-mediated ubiquitination

edges.mechanism: GA20ox1 catalyzes oxidation steps producing GA9 precursor
edges.evidence_sentence: GA20ox1 plays a more prominent role in elongation

edges.mechanism: GA3ox1 catalyzes 3β-hydroxylation producing bioactive GA4
edges.evidence_sentence: GA3ox1 has predominant role in plant development; ga3ox1 mutant displays semi-dwarf phenotype

edges.mechanism: GA2ox catalyzes 2β-hydroxylation inactivating bioactive GAs
edges.evidence_sentence: GA2ox overexpression lines show late flowering and dwarf phenotypes

edges.mechanism: GA1 (CPS) catalyzes first committed step in GA biosynthesis (GGPP → CPP)
edges.evidence_sentence: ga1-3 mutant shows extreme dwarf phenotype

edges.mechanism: Bioactive GA promotes hypocotyl elongation by inducing DELLA degradation
edges.evidence_sentence: GA promotes hypocotyl and stem elongation

edges.mechanism: Light inhibits GA biosynthesis (GA20ox/GA3ox down) and induces GA2ox catabolism, reducing bioactive GA in hypocotyl
edges.evidence_sentence: Light inhibits GA4 accumulation and GA signaling to prevent hypocotyl elongation

edges.mechanism: Light reduces GA, allowing DELLA accumulation
edges.evidence_sentence: Light promotes DELLA accumulation by decreasing the amount of GA4 in hypocotyl

edges.mechanism: BBX21 binds T/G-box in HY5 promoter to activate transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: BBX21 directly binds to the T/G-box in the HY5 promoter and directly activates HY5 expression

edges.mechanism: COP1 ubiquitinates BBX21 in dark for proteasomal degradation
edges.evidence_sentence: BBX21 is targeted for 26S proteasome-mediated degradation in darkness in a COP1-dependent manner

edges.mechanism: BBX21 acts as positive regulator of photomorphogenesis; bbx21 mutants have longer hypocotyls in light
edges.evidence_sentence: transgenic BBX21-OX lines exhibited significantly shorter hypocotyls

edges.mechanism: BBX22 promotes photomorphogenesis cooperatively with HY5
edges.evidence_sentence: BBX22 promotes photomorphogenesis; positive regulator like BBX21

edges.mechanism: BBX24 negatively regulates HY5 and promotes shade-induced elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: BBX24 plays an opposite function by promoting hypocotyl length in shady conditions

edges.mechanism: HFR1 forms non-DNA-binding heterodimer with PIF4, sequestering it from DNA targets
edges.evidence_sentence: HFR1 and PAR1 are atypical bHLH transcription factors that directly interact with PIF4/PIF5, and form a non-DNA-binding heterodimer

edges.mechanism: PAR1 forms non-DNA-binding heterodimer with PIF4
edges.evidence_sentence: PAR1 directly interacts with PIF4/PIF5 and forms non-DNA-binding heterodimer

edges.mechanism: HFR1 inhibits hypocotyl elongation under shade by antagonizing PIF action
edges.evidence_sentence: HFR1 sequesters PIFs preventing hypocotyl elongation

edges.mechanism: PAR1 dampens shade-induced elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: PAR1 inhibits PIF4/PIF5 reducing hypocotyl elongation under shade

edges.mechanism: Blue-light-activated CRY1 directly binds PIF4 and represses its transcriptional activity
edges.evidence_sentence: blue light-activated CRY1 directly interacts with PIF4 and represses PIF4 transcriptional activity

edges.mechanism: Evening Complex (ELF3-ELF4-LUX) directly binds PIF4 promoter to repress transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: The Evening Complex directly binds to the promoters of PIF4 and PIF5 and represses their expression

edges.mechanism: EC binds PIF5 promoter to repress transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: Evening Complex binds promoters of PIF4 and PIF5

edges.mechanism: ELF4 component of EC binds PIF4 promoter to repress at dusk
edges.evidence_sentence: Evening Complex (ELF3/ELF4/LUX) directly binds promoters of PIF4 and PIF5

edges.mechanism: LUX MYB-like protein binds PIF4 promoter as part of EC to repress transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: LUX is DNA-binding subunit of EC repressing PIF4

edges.mechanism: Warm temperature inactivates ELF3 (via prion-like domain phase transition + XBAT31-mediated degradation)
edges.evidence_sentence: Elevated temperature inactivates ELF3 and releases thermoresponsive growth

edges.mechanism: Warm temperature induces PIF4 expression and activity by releasing EC repression and decreasing phyB Pfr
edges.evidence_sentence: high temperature increases PIF4 activity

edges.mechanism: XBAT31 E3 ubiquitin ligase ubiquitinates ELF3 for proteasomal degradation at warm temperature
edges.evidence_sentence: XBAT31 interacts with ELF3, ubiquitinates ELF3, and promotes ELF3 degradation via the 26S proteasome

edges.mechanism: Warm temperature induces XBAT31 transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: the expression of XBAT31.1, but not XBAT31.2, was increased by warm temperature

edges.mechanism: BBX18 acts as cofactor recruiting ELF3 to XBAT31 for ubiquitination
edges.evidence_sentence: XBAT31 interacts with the B-box protein BBX18, and the XBAT31-mediated ELF3 degradation is dependent on BBX18

edges.mechanism: XBAT31 promotes thermomorphogenic elongation by degrading ELF3
edges.evidence_sentence: overexpression of XBAT31 accelerates ELF3 degradation and promotes hypocotyl growth

edges.mechanism: ELF3 represses hypocotyl elongation via PIF4 and GI repression; elf3 mutants have constitutive long hypocotyls
edges.evidence_sentence: elf3 mutant displays a constitutive thermomorphogenic phenotype (elongated hypocotyls) at 22°C

edges.mechanism: ELF4 component of EC represses hypocotyl elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: elf4 mutant has long hypocotyl phenotype

edges.mechanism: LUX as part of EC represses hypocotyl elongation
edges.evidence_sentence: lux mutant has long hypocotyl

edges.mechanism: GI inhibits PIF4 protein activity, partially via TOC1, providing negative feedback on thermomorphogenesis
edges.evidence_sentence: GI inhibits PIF4 by preventing PIF4 overactivation; this inhibition depends partially on TOC1

edges.mechanism: GI binds TOC1 promoter and activates transcription at high temperature at night
edges.evidence_sentence: GI is necessary for high temperature-induced elevation of TOC1 transcription

edges.mechanism: TOC1 represses PIF4 transcription and inhibits PIF4 protein activity
edges.evidence_sentence: TOC1 represses both the transcription of PIF4 and the transcriptional activation activity of its protein

edges.mechanism: PIF4 directly binds PBE-boxes in GI promoter to activate GI transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 directly activates GI transcription in concert with other PIFs

edges.mechanism: ELF3 binds GI promoter to repress transcription
edges.evidence_sentence: Loss of ELF3 resulted in increased GI transcript levels; ELF3 represses GI transcription

edges.mechanism: HY5 binds GI promoter to repress transcription, recruits SWR1 for H2A.Z deposition
edges.evidence_sentence: Loss of HY5 resulted in increased GI transcript levels; HY5 represses GI transcription

edges.mechanism: Warm temperature triggers HY5 protein degradation
edges.evidence_sentence: High temperature triggers the degradation of HY5

edges.mechanism: PIF4 directly activates auxin biosynthesis (YUC8, TAA1, CYP79B2), Aux/IAAs, and cell wall genes
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 increases auxin levels by directly activating the expression of key auxin biosynthesis genes; pif4 mutant insensitive to high temperatures

edges.mechanism: PIF4 directly activates TAA1 transcription, increasing IAA biosynthesis
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 increases auxin levels by directly activating the expression of key auxin biosynthesis genes

edges.mechanism: PIF4 activates CYP79B2 in IAOx pathway
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 activates auxin biosynthesis genes including CYP79B2

edges.mechanism: PIF4 activates ethylene biosynthesis ACS genes
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 promotes ethylene biosynthesis by activating the expression of several ethylene biosynthesis genes

edges.mechanism: PIF4 activates EIN3 to enhance ethylene signaling
edges.evidence_sentence: PIF4 enhances ethylene signaling by directly activating expression of ethylene key signaling transcription factor, ETHYLENE INSENSITIVE3

edges.mechanism: FCA RNA-binding protein removes H3K4me2 from YUC8 promoter, reducing PIF4-mediated activation
edges.evidence_sentence: FCA inhibits PIF4 binding to its target YUC8 promoter by removing H3K4me2 from the YUC8 promoter

perturbations.evidence_sentence: bri1 mutants are dwarfs with short hypocotyls
bak1 mutants have semi-dwarf phenotype
bin2-1 dominant mutant is dwarf with constitutive BR-insensitive phenotype
bzr1-1D dominant gain-of-function constitutively activates BR responses including longer hypocotyl
bes1-D dominant mutant shows BR-hypersensitive phenotype with elongated hypocotyl
det2 mutants are extreme dwarfs with constitutive photomorphogenesis in dark
dwf4 mutants are dwarfs with short hypocotyls rescuable by BL
BL treatment promotes hypocotyl elongation in WT
Brz BR biosynthesis inhibitor produces dwarf phenotype
ga1-3 mutant shows extreme dwarf with much reduced hypocotyl length
ga3ox1 single mutant is semi-dwarf
ga20ox1 mutants show reduced stem and hypocotyl growth
triple gid1 mutant is non-germinating extreme dwarf, phenotype more severe than ga1-3
sly1 mutant is semi-dwarf
rga loss-of-function partially suppresses ga1-3 dwarf phenotype
rga gai double mutant fully rescues ga1-3 vegetative growth
della quintuple (rga gai rgl1 rgl2 rgl3) mutant shows constitutively elongated hypocotyl independent of GA
gai-1 (Delta-DELLA) gain-of-function dwarf with short hypocotyl
PAC GA biosynthesis inhibitor produces dwarf phenotype
GA3 treatment promotes hypocotyl elongation, rescuing dwarfs
elf3 mutant displays a constitutive thermomorphogenic phenotype (elongated hypocotyls) at 22°C
arp6 mutants show a constitutive thermoresponsive growth phenotype
the hypocotyl length was significantly reduced in both lines of xbat31 mutants at warm temperature
the hypocotyl length of the XBAT31 overexpression plants was much longer than that of the WT
the hypocotyl phenotype was suppressed in bbx18-1 single mutant background at warm temperatures
gi-2 showed increased hypocotyl elongation compared with WT at high temperatures
Overexpression of GI suppressed hypocotyl elongation at high temperatures
toc1-2 mutant displayed increased hypocotyl elongation at high temperatures
TOC1 overexpression suppressed hypocotyl elongation
hypocotyl growth of pif4 mutants is insensitive to high temperatures
PIF4 overexpression lines have longer hypocotyls and are more resistant to PAC
plants overexpressing PIF5 are morphologically similar to plants overproducing ethylene
transgenic BBX21-OX lines exhibited significantly shorter hypocotyls compared with WT
bbx21-1 mutant showed slightly longer hypocotyl
hfr1 mutant has long hypocotyl in shade
par1 par2 has enhanced shade-induced elongation
cog1-3D single mutants show an elongated hypocotyl phenotype under light conditions
